plan.title: DAG visualization: match vBRIEF Studio quality — edge labels, status badges, item metadata
plan.author: plan

narratives.Problem: The dashboard DAG visualization is functional but visually basic compared to vBRIEF Studio. Edges have no labels, nodes lack status text badges, difficulty/priority indicators are cryptic single letters, edge styling is uniform gray, layout is tight, and the metadata panel is sparse.
narratives.Proposal: Implement all 6 improvements in a single deliverable across PlanDAG.tsx (nodes, edges, layout) and BeadsTasksPanel.tsx (metadata panel). Use existing ReactFlow APIs — edge labels, styled node badges, distinct edge colors per type, increased dagre spacing, and enriched detail panel.
narratives.Constraint: Must use existing ReactFlow v11.11.4 and dagre — no new dependencies. Dark theme only. Must preserve real-time socket.io status updates and critical path highlighting. Node click handler and detail panel must continue to work.
narratives.Risk: Node size increase may affect fit-view zoom level (mitigated by ReactFlow fitView auto-adjustment). Edge labels may overlap on dense graphs (mitigated by small font with background, single-word labels).
narratives.Alternative: Tooltip-only edge labels (rejected — Studio shows labels always, hover not discoverable). Separate tasks per improvement (rejected — all changes in 2 files, interdependent).

items.title: Add status text badges and expand difficulty/priority badges on DAG nodes

narrative.Action: In PlanDAG.tsx PlanItemNode component: (1) Add a colored pill badge showing status text ('pending', 'in progress', 'completed', 'blocked') using existing statusColors palette. (2) Expand single-letter difficulty badge to full word in a styled pill. (3) Replace 6px priority dot with a labeled badge. (4) Increase node dimensions from 180x60 to ~220x80 to accommodate badges. Update NODE_WIDTH/NODE_HEIGHT constants and dagre node size registration.

subItems.title: Each node displays a colored status text badge (e.g., 'pending', 'completed') — not just a colored border
Difficulty badge shows full word ('medium', 'complex') instead of single letter
Priority indicator is a labeled badge ('high', 'low') instead of an unlabeled colored dot
Node dimensions increased to accommodate badges without text crowding or overflow

items.title: Add edge type labels, distinct colors per type, and larger arrows

narrative.Action: In PlanDAG.tsx edge conversion: (1) Add 'label' property to each ReactFlow edge with the edge type name ('blocks', 'informs', 'suggests', 'invalidates'). Style labels with ~10px font and semi-transparent dark background. (2) Assign distinct stroke colors per edge type: blocks=#ef4444 (red), informs=#3b82f6 (blue), suggests=#8b5cf6 (purple), invalidates=#f59e0b (amber). (3) Increase markerEnd arrow size and ensure arrowhead color matches stroke. (4) Preserve existing critical path orange animation override.

subItems.title: Every edge displays its type as a text label ('blocks', 'informs', etc.) on the connection line
Each edge type has a visually distinct color (red for blocks, blue for informs, purple for suggests, amber for invalidates)
Arrowheads are larger and color-matched to their edge stroke
Critical path edges still render with orange animated styling, overriding per-type colors

items.title: Improve dagre layout spacing and enrich the item detail metadata panel

narrative.Action: Two parts: (1) In PlanDAG.tsx dagre config, increase nodesep from 40 to 60 and ranksep from 60 to 100 to reduce visual crowding with larger nodes. (2) In BeadsTasksPanel.tsx PlanItemDetail component, enrich the panel: show difficulty and priority as styled badges matching node badges; display all narrative fields (Problem, Constraint, etc.) not just Action; show sub-item completion progress ('2/5 acceptance criteria met'); list incoming/outgoing edges with types and connected item titles.

subItems.title: Dagre nodesep >= 60 and ranksep >= 100 — nodes no longer overlap or cluster awkwardly
Detail panel shows all available narrative fields (Problem, Constraint, Action, etc.), not just Action
Detail panel shows sub-item completion progress (e.g., '2/5 acceptance criteria met')
Detail panel lists incoming and outgoing edges with their type and connected item title
